name: budget_envelope
description: a personal budgeting world with spending envelopes and rollovers; actions spend, transfer, rollover

card.description: a personal budgeting world with spending envelopes and rollovers; actions spend, transfer, rollover

rules: 'spend' deducts params.amount (default 50) from params.envelope; spending is capped at the envelope's balance (no overdraft) and spent_total rises by the amount actually paid.
'transfer' moves params.amount (default 25) from params.from to params.to, capped at the source balance; total funds across envelopes are conserved.
'rollover' advances to a new period: every envelope keeps its remaining balance (carried into rollover_total) and is then topped up by its monthly allocation; period increments by one.
Unknown or missing envelope names fall back to deterministic defaults so every action is total; balances are rounded to cents.

emit.report: period {period}: spent {spent_total} so far, {rollover_total} rolled over

objectives.name: stay solvent
objectives.goal: keep every envelope balance at or above zero

objectives.name: spend the plan
objectives.goal: max spent_total without overdrawing any envelope
